# Todo overlay mode

| Field        | Value                    |
|-------------|--------------------------|
| Phase       | P5: Polish               |
| Priority    | Should have              |
| Status      | Not started              |
| Est. Effort | Medium (3-5h)            |
| Dependencies| Core loop working        |

## Description

Detect "add to my list" or "todo" in voice input. Append to a daily todo list (same log directory). Show in morning summary.
